title: StoryAnvil's Create Styled Tools
description: Resource pack that adds tools from create materials
body:
## Resourcepack requires Optifine or CIT

Simple rename-resource pack that adds tools with new materials from [create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).

Including zinc, andesite, brass and even industrial iron tools to minecraft!

## How to get theese tools?
Andesite tools are renamed stone tools (for example: rename stone axe to Andesite axe to get one).

Zinc(done) and brass(comming soon) tools are renamed iron tools.

Industrial iron(comming soon) are renamed netherite tools.
